title: Fix boss spawns and mob count

log.context: Fix boss spawns and mob count

Clean startup, no errors. Here is what was changed:

**Server changes (`/mnt/data/commons-server/src/dungeon/`):**

1. **`dungeon-protocol.ts`**:
   - Added `totalMobs` and `remainingMobs` fields to `DungeonTickMessage`
   - Added `bossSpawned: boolean` field to `EnemyInstance`

2. **`dungeon-loop.ts`**:
   - Added `originalEnemyCount` and `bossRoomBounds` to `InstanceEphemeral`
   - Pre-placed enemies get `bossSpawned: false`, boss-spawned minions get `bossSpawned: true`
   - After floor init, ...(truncated)
